LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_52.english: Please continue to leave it to me!

LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_53.english: Okay, I'll be looking forward to it.

LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_56.english: Everything is no different from usual... but it seems like my soul energy is overflowing more than usual.
LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_56.korean: 모든 게 평소와 다르지 않은데…&n평소보다 소울 에너지가 넘쳐 흐르고 있는 것 같습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_57.english: I thought that obedience—following orders to the end without disobeying—was my belief.
LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_57.korean: 저는 명령을 거스르지 않고 끝까지 따르는 복종이&n제가 가진 신념이라고 생각했습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_58.english: However, the Commander has never once given me an order.
LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_58.korean: 하지만 사령관님은 저에게 단 한 번도 명령을 내리신 적이 없습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_59.english: But just being with the Commander... why is it like this...
LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_59.korean: 그런데 사령관님과 함께 있는 것만으로… 어째서 이렇게…

LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_6.english: My lovely butterfly, won't you go to a faraway place with this old lady?
LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_6.korean: 우리 사랑스러운 나비야,&n이 할미와 함께 머나먼 곳으로 떠나지 않겠니?

LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_60.english: Oh? Hello. It's nice to meet you again.

LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_62.english: Her name was definitely… Miss Lee Nabi, right?

LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_64.english: Of course! After all, you are a 'new being' that we have never seen before. Wouldn't it be strange not to be interested?
LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_64.korean: 그야 물론이죠! 지금까지 본 적이 없는 '새로운 존재' 이시니까요.&n관심이 가지 않는 게 이상하지 않겠습니까?

LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_66.english: Ahaha, you are being cautious. It is natural to be wary of someone you meet for the first time, but you don't need to be so suspicious.
LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_66.korean: 아하하, 경계하시군요.&n처음 보는 사람을 경계하는 건 당연한 행동이지만, 그렇게 의심하지 않아도 괜찮습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_67.english: have some information that might be helpful to you. How to become a 'true Soulworker'... would that pique your interest?
LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_67.korean: 저는 당신께 도움이 될 만한 정보를 가지고 있습니다.&n'진정한 소울워커'가 되는 방법… 이라고 하면 솔깃하려나요?

LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_69.english: Absolutely! However, to become a Soulworker, you must head to a specific location.
LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_69.korean: 정말이고 말고요!&n하지만 소울워커가 되기 위해선 특정 장소로 향해야 합니다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_7.english: Let us leave the side of humans and embark on an eternally joyful journey within this void.
LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_7.korean: 인간의 곁을 떠나 이 공백의 안에서, 영원히 즐거운 여행을 떠나자꾸나.

LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_70.english: I happen to know how to get there! How about it? I’ll guide you, so why don’t we go together?
LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_70.korean: 마침 제가 그 장소로 가는 방법을 알고 있죠!&n어떠신가요? 안내해 드릴 테니 이대로 같이 가보시는 건?

LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_71.english: You cannot leave the operational area without permission. If that is true… I must report to the Commander first…
LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_71.korean: 허가 없이 작전지를 이탈할 수 없습니다.&n그 말이 사실이라면… 먼저 사령관님께 보고를…

LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_72.english: What are you talking about? If you want permission, this old lady can grant it to you anytime.
LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_72.korean: 무슨 소리니?&n허가라면 이 할미가 얼마든지 내려줄 수 있단다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_74.english: Our butterfly only needs this old lady's permission.
LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_74.korean: 우리 나비는 이 할미의 허락만 있으면 된다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_75.english: That cannot be. My superior is the Commander.

LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_76.english: Indeed… is that really the case?

LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_78.english: Now, listen carefully to the voice you hear.
LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_78.korean: 자, 들려오는 목소리에 귀를 잘 기울여보세요.

LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_79.english: My lovely baby… My proud baby…
LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_79.korean: 사랑스러운 우리 아가… 자랑스러운 우리 아가…

LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_8.english: … It is a very attractive offer. If it is an order from the Godmother, there is no reason to refuse.
LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_8.korean: …너무나도 매력적인 제안입니다.&n대모 님의 명령이라면 거절할 이유도 없습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_80.english: Do not listen. Do not think. Follow only this old woman's words, and remember only this old woman's voice. Nothing else is needed. Forget everything else.
LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_80.korean: 듣지 마라. 생각하지 마라.&n이 할미의 말만 따르고, 이 할미의 목소리만 기억해라.&n다른 건 필요 없다. 다른 건 잊어라.

LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_81.english: Do not move on your own. Abandon yourself. You can do nothing without me. You cannot speak or act without me.
LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_81.korean: 스스로 움직이지 마라. 자신을 버려라.&n너는 나 없이는 아무것도 할 수 없다.&n너는 나 없이는 말할 수도, 행동할 수도 없다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_82.english: Why do you try to disobey? Why do you try to rebel? Don't think about it yourself. This old woman will think about it for you.
LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_82.korean: 왜 거역하려 하니? 왜 반항하려 하니?&n네가 생각하지 마라. 이 할미가 대신 생각해주마.

LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_83.english: Obey orders'—remember just that one phrase. That is all you are. You are nothing.
LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_83.korean: ‘명령에 복종’—그 한 마디만 기억해라.&n그것이 네 전부다.&n넌 아무것도 아니란다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_84.korean: 넌. 아. 무. 것. 도. 아. 니. 란. 다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_86.english: Now, follow this old woman. You will surely be happy.
LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_86.korean: 자, 이 할미를 따라오너라.&n분명 행복할 거란다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_89.english: Then… Commander. What will you do with this child?
LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_89.korean: 그럼… 사령관 씨.&n이 아이를, 어떻게 하시겠습니까?

LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_9.english: That's right, that's right! You're such a good child!

LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_1.english: From the next mission onwards, we will move to a different location to proceed.
LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_1.korean: 다음 임무부터는 다른 장소로 이동해 진행할 거야.

LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_10.english: It's the Commander and the Butterfly. What brings you both to a place like this?
LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_10.korean: 사령관과 나비구나.&n둘 다 이런 곳엔 무슨 일로 왔니?

LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_100.english: Sergeant Lee Nabi, you are on an operation. Stay alert.
LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_100.korean: 이나비 하사, 작전 중이다.&n정신 똑바로 차리도록.

LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_102.english: Are you bothered by what happened just a moment ago?
LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_102.korean: 조금 전의 일을 신경 쓰고 있는 건가?

LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_103.english: … Yes, his judgment was correct. If you are in a situation where you cannot do anything on your own, you must get out and request support.
LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_103.korean: …네, 그의 판단은 정확했습니다.&n혼자서 아무것도 할 수 없는 상황이라면 벗어나 지원을 요청해야 합니다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_104.english: However… even though I understand it in my head, I cannot easily accept the choice to survive alone, leaving my colleagues behind… as truly the right thing to do.
LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_104.korean: 그런데… 머리로는 이해해도, 동료들을 두고 혼자 살아남는 선택이…&n정말로 옳은 일인지, 쉽게 납득되지 않습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_105.english: Then, if you were a Staff Sergeant, how do you think you would have acted in that situation?
LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_105.korean: 그럼, 하사라면 그 상황에서 어떻게 행동했을 것 같나?

LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_107.english: I, too… would have chosen to run away.

LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_108.english: That is enough. The battlefield is always a series of choices.

LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_109.english: There are times when you make the right choice, and times when you make the wrong choice.
LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_109.korean: 옳은 선택을 할 때도, 틀린 선택을 할 때도 있지.

LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_11.english: I have come after receiving a call from the Commander.

LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_110.english: The battlefield is a place where a single wrong choice can cost you your life, but there is something more important than that.
LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_110.korean: 한 번의 잘못된 선택으로 목숨을 잃을 수도 있는 곳이 전장이지만,&n그보다 더 중요한 것이 있다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_111.english: Something more important… what is it?

LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_113.english: Even the right choice leads to failure if you hesitate. Conversely, even a wrong choice can produce unexpected results if you push forward without hesitation.
LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_113.korean: 옳은 선택이라도 주저하면 실패로 이어진다.&n반대로 틀린 선택이라도 망설이지 않고 밀어붙이면, 의외의 결과를 만들기도 한다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_114.english: Do not waver no matter what moment comes, Hasa.
LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_114.korean: 어떤 순간이 오더라도 흔들리지 마라, 하사.

LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_115.english: Do not be afraid to act according to your own judgment and will.
LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_115.korean: 네 판단을, 네 의지로 움직이는 걸 두려워하지 마라.

LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_116.english: Yes! I will take that to heart! Thank you, Captain Marie!

LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_118.english: Steel Line Unit, begin searching for the missing advance team member! Report immediately if any abnormal situations occur!
LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_118.korean: 스틸 라인 부대, 지금부터 실종된 선발대원을 수색한다!&n이상 상황 발생 시 즉각 보고하도록!

LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_12.english: … I’m planning to talk about something personal for a moment. Nabi, I’m sorry, but could you ask that old man to move to another place for a while?
LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_12.korean: …잠시 개인적인 이야기를 할 생각이야.&n나비, 미안하지만 그 늙은이에게 부탁해 잠시 다른 곳으로 자리를 옮겨달라 해줄 수 있겠어?

LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_16.english: There is no need to apologize, Nabi. Since leaving the training camp, your commander has been the Commander.
LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_16.korean: 미안해할 것 없단다, 나비야.&n훈련소에서 나온 이래 네 명령권자는 사령관이란다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_17.english: It looks like you intend to have a serious conversation, so I should step back here.
LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_17.korean: 보아하니 진지한 이야기를 나누려는 것 같으니,&n여기선 내가 한 발짝 물러나 주어야지.

LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_18.english: Are you making room for me?

LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_19.english: Alright, as you asked, this old woman will step aside and go somewhere else.
LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_19.korean: 그래, 부탁한 대로 이 할미는 어디 다른 데로 비켜주마.

LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_20.english: Thank you, Godmother. Then, I will see you again next time.
LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_20.korean: 감사합니다, 대모님. 그럼 다음에 다시 뵙겠습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_21.english: Is it disappearing more obediently than I thought?

LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_22.english: Haha, young people are the future of the world. How could I possibly dare to interfere?
LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_22.korean: 후후, 젊은 아이들은 세상의 미래란다.&n내가 어찌 감히 방해할 수 있겠니.

LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_23.english: It might be very different from the image I had in mind.
LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_23.korean: 내가 생각한 이미지와는 많이 다를지도 모르겠어.

LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_24.english: That might be true. People are bound to change as they live a long time, aren't they?
LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_24.korean: 그럴지도 모르겠구나.&n오래 살다 보면 사람이 변할 수도 있는 법이지 않겠느냐?

LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_26.english: Hehe, see you again next time.

LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_27.english: Well, since the troublemaker seems to be gone, I'll get back to my personal story.
LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_27.korean: 그럼 방해꾼도 사라진 거 같으니 다시 개인적인 이야기로 돌아갈게.

LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_28.english: You might not know this, but a very long time ago, humanity created dolls to transcend human limitations. Dolls were successful and soon became indispensable to humankind.
LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_28.korean: 너는 잘 모를 수도 있지만 아주 오래 전, 인류는 인간의 한계를 넘어서기 위해 인형을 만들었어.&n인형은 성공적이었고 곧 인류에 없어서는 안 될 존재가 되었지.

LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_29.english: However, human greed knew no bounds, and eventually, they even dragged the dolls into war.
LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_29.korean: 하지만 인간의 욕심은 끝이 없었고, 결국 전쟁에까지 인형들을 끌어들였어.

LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_3.english: I heard that a gap with unrestricted access was recently discovered. Investigating that place will be your new mission.
LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_3.korean: 최근 출입이 자유로운 공백이 발견되었다고 해.&n그곳을 조사하는 게 새로운 임무가 될 거야.

LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_30.english: Dolls as mere puppets following orders. Beings not allowed to think for themselves or possess a will.
LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_30.korean: 명령만 따르는 꼭두각시로서의 인형들.&n스스로 생각할 수도, 의지를 가지는 것도 허락되지 않은 존재였지.

LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_32.english: When I first saw you, you reminded me of the dolls of that era. Because the way you looked was a life of moving according to orders.
LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_32.korean: 너를 처음 봤을 때, 그 시절 인형들의 모습이 떠올랐어.&n네가 보여주는 모습은 명령에 따라 움직이는 삶이었으니까.

LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_33.english: I mean a life without one's own will, not even allowed to think for oneself.
LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_33.korean: 스스로 생각하는 것조차 허락받지 못한 채, 자신의 의지가 없는 삶을 말이야.

LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_34.english: However, receiving orders is the reason for my existence. I cannot disobey.
LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_34.korean: 하지만 저는, 명령을 받는 것이 존재의 이유입니다. 거역할 수 없습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_35.english: Obedience' that follows to the very end without resistance is my only will and belief. The moment I lose that, I lose my value as a Soulworker.
LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_35.korean: 거스르지 않고 끝까지 뒤따르는 '복종'이야말로 제가 가진 유일한 의지이자 신념입니다.&n그걸 잃는 순간, 저는 소울워커로서의 가치를 잃습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_36.english: You lose your strength, and you lose yourself. You become a human being... who truly has nothing.
LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_36.korean: 힘을 잃고, 자신을 잃습니다.&n정말 아무것도 없는… 인간이… 됩니다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_38.english: … I wish you had told me you weren't okay. I guess you still need time.
LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_38.korean: …괜찮지 않다고 말해줬으면 좋았을 텐데.&n아직은 시간이 필요하겠지.

LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_39.english: … Now, let's go back to where we were. The other members must be ready by now.
LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_39.korean: …자, 원래 있던 곳으로 돌아가자.&n다른 대원들도 준비를 마쳤을 거야.

LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_41.english: It looks like everyone is here.

LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_42.english: Commander, I've been waiting for you!

LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_43.english: All preparations for departure are complete.

LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_44.english: I packed all the supplies, too!

LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_46.english: The Steel Line unit has assembled, Your Excellency.
LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_46.korean: 스틸 라인 부대 집합 완료했습니다, 각하.

LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_47.english: Okay, then let's start with a blank space.

LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_48.english: So, I'm leaving this place now.

LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_49.english: Godmother... Thank you for taking care of me all this time.

LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_5.english: We're going to leave as soon as the rest of the team is ready... Is there anything else left to do?
LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_5.korean: 다른 대원들의 준비가 끝나는 대로 출발할 건데…&n혹시 다른 할 일이 남아 있어?

LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_50.english: I’ve known you since our days in boot camp, so it’s sad to see the day come when you leave.
LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_50.korean: 훈련소 시절부터 보아왔는데, 이렇게 떠나는 날이 오다니 쓸쓸하구나.

LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_51.english: However, this is also a mission entrusted to me. I will definitely accomplish it and return.
LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_51.korean: 하지만 이 또한 제게 내려진 사명입니다.&n반드시 해내고 돌아오겠습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_52.english: Your Excellency… this is what you mentioned…

LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_53.english: … Let’s keep quiet for now. We should at least share a moment of farewell one last time.
LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_53.korean: …지금은 조용히 있자.&n마지막 정도는 이별의 시간을 나눠야지.

LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_54.english: No, I won't talk at length. Talking for too long will only leave me with lingering regrets.
LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_54.korean: 아니, 길게 얘기하지는 않으마.&n너무 오래 이야기 해봐야 미련만 남으니까.

LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_55.english: My dear butterfly, this old lady cannot leave because she has work to do here. I am truly sorry and sad to see you go.
LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_55.korean: 나비야, 이 할미는 이곳에서 해야 할 일이 있어 떠날 수 없단다.&n정말 미안하고 아쉽구나.

LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_56.english: It’s alright! From now on, I will carry out my missions under the Commander’s orders.
LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_56.korean: 괜찮습니다!&n향후엔 사령관님의 명령을 받으며 임무에 임하겠습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_57.english: Yes, you've done a great job. This grandma will always be watching over you and cheering for you.
LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_57.korean: 그래, 장하구나.&n이 할미는 언제나 널 지켜보고 응원하고 있으마.

LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_59.english: No matter where you are, Grandma is watching to make sure you don't do anything wrong.
LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_59.korean: 어디에 있든 할미는 네가 잘못하지 않는지 지켜보고 있단다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_60.english: You can never escape from this old woman. Never. Live by following her words.
LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_60.korean: 이 할미에게서 벗어날 수 없단다.&n영원히. 할미의 말을 따르며 살거라.

LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_62.english: Once we've finished our introductions, let's leave. The advance investigation team will be waiting for us.
LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_62.korean: 인사가 끝났으면 출발하자.&n선발 조사대가 우리를 기다리고 있을 거야.

LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_63.english: Welcome, everyone! We've been waiting for you!

LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_64.english: I am Roy, a member of the advance investigation team. It is an honor to meet you.
LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_64.korean: 저는 선발 조사대원 로이라고 합니다.&n이렇게 만나 뵙게 되어 영광입니다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_65.english: So you are the Commander. I have heard a lot about you. It is a pleasure to work with you!
LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_65.korean: 당신이 사령관이시군요. 소문은 익히 들었습니다.&n잘 부탁드립니다!

LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_67.english: What is wrong? Is there something on my face?

LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_7.english: Then, could you come with me for a moment? I have something I want to tell Nabi in a quiet place.
LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_7.korean: 그럼 잠시 따라와 줄래?&n조용한 곳에서 나비에게 하고 싶은 얘기가 있어.

LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_71.english: Are we really meeting for the 'first' time?

LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_73.english: Haha, Commander, that's an interesting thing to say!

LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_74.english: Of course, this is our first time meeting. Where else would the opportunity have been for the Commander and me to meet?
LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_74.korean: 당연히 처음 뵙는 겁니다.&n저와 사령관님이 만날 기회가 어디 있었겠습니까?

LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_75.english: … Okay. That was a strange question.

LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_76.english: It's okay. It's a relief if the misunderstanding has been cleared up.

LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_77.english: I heard there were problems based on the advance team's investigation report.
LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_77.korean: 선발대 조사 보고를 보니 문제가 있었다고 들었어.

LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_78.english: That's right. There was a big problem!

LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_79.english: Commander, you know that the component of the Void is immense Desire Energy, don't you? That power stimulates and corrupts human desires.
LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_79.korean: 사령관님은 공백의 구성요소가 막대한 데자이어 에너지라는 사실을 아시지요?&n그 힘은 인간의 욕망을 자극하고 타락시키죠.

LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_80.english: As a result of that influence, most of the advance party fell into a delusion and deserted the base.
LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_80.korean: 그 영향으로 선발대 대부분이 환상에 빠져 주둔지를 이탈하는 사태가 벌어졌습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_81.english: Does showing an illusion mean… that the place itself has a will?
LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_81.korean: 환상을 보여준다는 건…&n장소 그 자체가 의지를 가졌다는 말이야?

LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_83.english: At that time, the investigation team was in the midst of investigating the Void, an unknown location! However, the number of people began to gradually decrease, one by one.
LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_83.korean: 그때 조사대는 한창 미지의 장소인 공백을 조사하던 중이었죠!&n하지만 한 사람, 또 한 사람 인원이 점차 줄어들기 시작했습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_84.english: Realizing the gravity of the situation, we immediately chased after the stray members! But how could this happen!
LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_84.korean: 상황의 심각함을 알아차린 저희는 곧바로 이탈한 인원을 찾으러 쫓아갔습니다!&n그런데, 어떻게 이런 일이!

LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_85.english: They were already possessed by something and out of their minds.
LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_85.korean: 그들은 이미 무언가에 홀려 제정신이 아니었습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_86.english: They were calling out to themselves, being chased by something. Some were dying with happy faces, others with faces filled with fear.
LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_86.korean: 자신을 부르고 있다, 무언가에 쫓기고 있다.&n누군가는 기쁜 얼굴로, 누군가는 두려움이 만연한 얼굴로 죽어가고 있었죠.

LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_87.english: If I had gotten out even a little later, I wouldn't have been safe either.
LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_87.korean: 조금이라도 늦게 빠져나왔다면 저 역시 무사하지 못했을 겁니다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_88.english: So, are you saying you abandoned your comrades and ran away alone?
LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_88.korean: 그럼 당신은 동료들을 버리고 혼자 도망쳐 나왔다는 겁니까?

LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_89.english: What could I do? There was nothing I could do on my own. Someone had to survive for me to report it, didn't they?
LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_89.korean: 어쩔 수 없지 않습니까? 저 혼자 할 수 있는 건 아무것도 없었으니까요.&n누구라도 살아남아야 보고를 하지 않겠어요?

LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_9.english: I think this place would be good.

LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_92.english: Leave the rest to us. We'll rescue the deserted investigators as well.
LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_92.korean: 뒷일은 우리에게 맡겨줘.&n이탈한 조사 대원들도 구조할 테니까.

LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_93.english: Yes, I ask for your help. I pray for your safe return.

LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_94.english: Your Excellency, we have arrived at the target point.

LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_96.english: No suspicious phenomena have occurred yet.

LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_97.english: [c][00FF00][Understood. Everyone, stay on alert. Think of everything you see from now on as an illusion.][-][/c]
LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_97.korean: [c][00FF00][알았어. 모두 경계 태세를 유지해.&n지금부터 보이는 모든 것이 환상일 수 있다고 생각해.][-][/c]

LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_98.english: It is just as Your Excellency said. Do not jump to conclusions, but doubt everything!
LastCorruptedRecord4-4OP_98.korean: 각하의 말씀대로다.&n섣불리 단정하지 말고, 모든 걸 의심하도록!

LastCorruptedRecord4-4SUBED_1.english: - On my way back to the room, I ran into Iris, who seemed to be looking for something.
LastCorruptedRecord4-4SUBED_1.korean: - 방으로 돌아가는 도중, 무언가를 찾고 있는 듯한 이리스와 마주쳤다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-4SUBED_10.english: I'm asking just in case, but Commander, by any chance...
LastCorruptedRecord4-4SUBED_10.korean: 설마 해서 묻는 거지만, 사령관 혹시…

LastCorruptedRecord4-4SUBED_11.english: Oh my, Commander? Miss Iris? What are you two doing here?
LastCorruptedRecord4-4SUBED_11.korean: 어머, 사령관님? 이리스 양? 두 분 다 여기서 뭐하세요?

LastCorruptedRecord4-4SUBED_12.english: Ah, Shirayuri, you came at just the right time. I have something I want to ask you, too.
LastCorruptedRecord4-4SUBED_12.korean: 아, 시라유리 마침 잘 왔어.&n너한테도 묻고 싶은 게 있어.

LastCorruptedRecord4-4SUBED_14.english: Virtual reality? I mean the little kid I met when I was over there...
LastCorruptedRecord4-4SUBED_14.korean: 가상 현실? 그쪽에 있었을 때 만났던 꼬마 녀석 말인데…

LastCorruptedRecord4-4SUBED_15.english: Um... what's it called... it's not here, right?

LastCorruptedRecord4-4SUBED_16.english: That's true... If it's that kid... *glance*...

LastCorruptedRecord4-4SUBED_17.english: … Why are you looking this way? I, I don't know… Really…
LastCorruptedRecord4-4SUBED_17.korean: …왜 이쪽을 바라보는 거야.&n나, 나는 몰라… 정말이야…

LastCorruptedRecord4-4SUBED_18.english: Hehehe, that's a shame, but it's virtual reality. It's not here.

LastCorruptedRecord4-4SUBED_19.english: I guess that’s how it is… I wanted to meet you again… and I have things I want to say.
LastCorruptedRecord4-4SUBED_19.korean: 역시 그런가… 다시 만나고 싶었는데… 하고 싶은 말도 있고.

LastCorruptedRecord4-4SUBED_20.english: What do you want to say?

LastCorruptedRecord4-4SUBED_21.english: I still haven't been able to say thank you... Now that I think about it, I was really just a fool there who only knew how to throw tantrums.
LastCorruptedRecord4-4SUBED_21.korean: 아직 고맙다는 말을 하지 못했거든…&n이제 와서 생각해보니, 그곳에서의 난 정말 때 쓰는 것 밖에 모르는 바보였어.

LastCorruptedRecord4-4SUBED_22.english: Isn't it a relief that you realized it now, even if it's late? Hehehe, did you understand a little bit of how I felt dealing with Miss Iris back then?
LastCorruptedRecord4-4SUBED_22.korean: 지금이라도 아셨으니 다행 아닐까요?&n우후후, 그때의 이리스 양을 상대하는 저의 심정을 조금은 이해하셨나요?

LastCorruptedRecord4-4SUBED_23.english: Ugh, I wouldn't have anything to say even if I had ten mouths.
LastCorruptedRecord4-4SUBED_23.korean: 윽, 입이 열개라도 할 말이 없네.

LastCorruptedRecord4-4SUBED_24.english: Well, anyway, if we can't meet now, it can't be helped.
LastCorruptedRecord4-4SUBED_24.korean: 뭐, 아무튼 이제는 만날 수 없다면 어쩔 수 없겠네.

LastCorruptedRecord4-4SUBED_25.english: Well, I don't know. Maybe we could meet again... you know?
LastCorruptedRecord4-4SUBED_25.korean: 글쎄요? 다시 만날 수 있을지도… 말이죠?

LastCorruptedRecord4-4SUBED_27.english: Really? How can I meet you?
LastCorruptedRecord4-4SUBED_27.korean: 정말? 어떻게 하면 만날 수 있는데?

LastCorruptedRecord4-4SUBED_28.english: How can I meet you, Commander?
LastCorruptedRecord4-4SUBED_28.korean: 어떻게 하면 만날 수 있을까요? 사령관님?

LastCorruptedRecord4-4SUBED_29.english: Why are you asking me that…

LastCorruptedRecord4-4SUBED_3.english: Ah! Finally found it…! What? Is it the Commander…

LastCorruptedRecord4-4SUBED_30.english: Commander, do you know!? How can I meet that kid who looks like you again!?
LastCorruptedRecord4-4SUBED_30.korean: 사령관은 알고 있어!?&n사령관을 닮은 그 꼬마와 어떻게 하면 다시 만날 수 있는지!?

LastCorruptedRecord4-4SUBED_31.english: Wait, if you speak that loudly in a place like this…
LastCorruptedRecord4-4SUBED_31.korean: 잠깐, 이런 곳에서 그렇게 큰 목소리로 말하면…

LastCorruptedRecord4-4SUBED_32.english: Oh my~? I think I just heard something that's hard to ignore~?
LastCorruptedRecord4-4SUBED_32.korean: 어머~? 이거 그냥은 지나치기 힘든 소리를 들은 거 같은데요~?

LastCorruptedRecord4-4SUBED_33.english: A little kid who looks like the Commander... I wish you could tell me more details.
LastCorruptedRecord4-4SUBED_33.korean: 사령관님을 닮은 꼬마라니… 좀 더 자세히 들려주셨으면 좋겠네요.

LastCorruptedRecord4-4SUBED_34.english: You need to hurry and find them to reassure them.

LastCorruptedRecord4-4SUBED_35.english: Heck, to think I'd come find you already! Haa!

LastCorruptedRecord4-4SUBED_36.english: - I became the wind just as I was and ran down the hallway without looking back.
LastCorruptedRecord4-4SUBED_36.korean: - 나는 그대로 바람이 되어, 뒤도 돌아보지 않고 복도를 달려나갔다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-4SUBED_38.english: What on earth has happened all this time?
LastCorruptedRecord4-4SUBED_38.korean: 대체 그동안 무슨 일이 있었던 거야?

LastCorruptedRecord4-4SUBED_5.english: Well… for now, that’s the case, right?

LastCorruptedRecord4-4SUBED_7.english: What's wrong? Staring at my face like that?
LastCorruptedRecord4-4SUBED_7.korean: 왜 그래? 내 얼굴을 그렇게 빤히 쳐다보고?

LastCorruptedRecord4-4SUBED_8.english: So I see, they really are alike...

LastCorruptedRecord4-4SUBED_9.english: Ahaha, I wonder who I resemble... There shouldn't be anyone in Orca who looks like me...
LastCorruptedRecord4-4SUBED_9.korean: 아하하, 누구랑 닮았다는 걸까…&n오르카에서 나랑 비슷한 사람은 없을 텐데…

LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_10.english: You must be disappointed. But it's okay. This old lady is right here by your side.
LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_10.korean: 실망했구나.&n하지만 괜찮다. 이 할미가 곁에 있잖니.

LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_100.english: I thought I needed someone to give me orders... I didn't think I needed anything else.
LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_100.korean: 저에게 명령해 줄 사람이 필요하다고… 다른 건 필요 없다고 생각했습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_102.english: You might say that it is just that the person giving the orders has changed.
LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_102.korean: 그저 명령해 줄 사람이 달라졌을 뿐이라고 말할지도 모릅니다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_103.english: Nothing may have changed, nothing may have changed, and nothing may have improved.
LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_103.korean: 아무것도 변하지 않고, 아무것도 달라지지 않고, 아무것도 나아지지 않았을지도 모릅니다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_104.english: But it’s okay. Because this is who I am.

LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_105.english: Right now, I am Lee Nabi, a member of Orca.
LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_105.korean: 지금 전, 어디까지나 오르카의 일원인 이나비입니다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_106.english: Thank you, Godmother. I have been able to live until now because of you.
LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_106.korean: 감사합니다 대모님, 전 당신이 있었기 때문에 지금까지 살 수 있었습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_107.english: Loyalty! Thank you for your hard work so far.

LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_108.english: And… Victory! I look forward to working with you, Commander.
LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_108.korean: 그리고… 승리! 앞으로 잘 부탁드립니다 사령관님.

LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_11.english: … That is correct. Godmother always gave me orders. She even gave me a reason for breathing.
LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_11.korean: …그렇습니다.&n대모 님은 늘 명령을 내려주셨습니다.&n숨 쉬는 것조차 이유를 주셨습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_111.english: Player: Commander Character: Lee Nabi Ending Branch: Achieved.
LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_111.korean: 플레이어 : 사령관&n인물 : 이나비&n엔딩 분기 : 달성 완료.

LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_112.english: Permission to view the following records.

LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_114.english: Identifying interference factors encountered during gameplay…
LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_114.korean: 플레이 중, 접근한 간섭 요인을 확인…

LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_116.english: Removal failed… You do not have permission to remove the target.
LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_116.korean: 제거 실패… 대상의 제거 권한이 없습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_117.korean: 발생할 수 있는 위험 변수를 확인…

LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_118.english: To resolve this… we attempt to intervene once again.
LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_118.korean: 이를 해결하기 위해… 다시 한번 개입을 시도합니다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_12.english: Then you may cry now. I give you, who have nothing, the command to live quietly.
LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_12.korean: 그렇다면 이제 울어도 된다.&n아무것도 없는 네게 조용히 살아가라는 명령을 주마.

LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_14.english: Now, come here and hug me. Don't think about anything, just quietly close your eyes.
LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_14.korean: 자, 이리로 와서 안기거라.&n아무 생각 말고 조용히 눈 감거라.

LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_15.english: You don't need to hear the sounds outside. Fold your wings inside the cocoon and hold your breath.
LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_15.korean: 바깥의 소리는 들을 필요 없단다.&n고치 안에서 날개를 접고 숨을 죽이거라.

LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_16.english: This old lady will stay by our Nabi's side forever... I will give commands for Nabi, who can do nothing.
LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_16.korean: 이 할미는 언제까지고 우리 나비의 곁에서…&n아무것도 못하는 나비를 위해 명령해 주마.

LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_17.english: My dear child, so lovely, so heartbreaking, and so insignificant.
LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_17.korean: 너무나도 사랑스럽고, 너무나도 애달프며, 너무나도 하찮은 우리 아이야.

LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_18.english: Think no more, and fade away endlessly in this embrace.
LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_18.korean: 더 이상 아무 생각 말고 이 품 안에서 하염없이 스러지거라.

LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_22.english: You are lying to this old woman.

LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_24.english: If not in this old woman's arms, where on earth would you be?
LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_24.korean: 이 할미의 품 안이 아니라면 대체 어디에 있겠다니 거니?

LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_25.english: … She always talks to me. I don't know what she is thinking.
LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_25.korean: …그분은 항상 저에게 말을 걸어주십니다.&n무슨 생각을 하는지는 알 수 없습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_26.english: However, they always gave me the opportunity to think for myself. They treated me with requests rather than orders.
LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_26.korean: 하지만, 언제나 저에게 스스로 생각할 기회를 주었습니다.&n명령이 아닌 부탁으로 대해주었습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_27.english: It’s just that I lack the confidence to issue an order, don’t you know?
LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_27.korean: 단순히 명령을 내릴 자신이 없을 뿐이지 모르지 않느냐?

LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_28.english: That might be the case. Still, they didn't abandon me until the very end.
LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_28.korean: 그럴지도 모릅니다.&n그래도 끝까지 절 버리지는 않았습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_29.english: What do you want from that man?
LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_29.korean: 네가 그 남자에게서 바라는 것은 어떤것이지?

LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_3.english: This is the inner self of our butterfly, deep within your heart. It is a place where you encounter another essence of yourself.
LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_3.korean: 여기는 우리 나비의 내면, 네 마음속 깊은 곳.&n또 다른 자신의 본질을 마주하는 장소란다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_31.english: And… I want to stay by your side.

LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_32.english: Haha, it looks like this old woman has finished all her work before I knew it.
LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_32.korean: 후후, 어느새 이 할미는 할 일을 모두 마쳤나 보구나.

LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_33.english: Then I guess I should leave now…

LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_35.english: Why are you acting like that, my dear? With such a sad face?
LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_35.korean: 왜 그러느냐 아가야?&n그런 슬픈 얼굴을 하고?

LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_36.english: You are someone I have relied on for the past 10 years. Now that I know you are disappearing, I want to see you off one last time.
LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_36.korean: 당신은 10년 동안 제가 의지해온 존재입니다.&n사라진다는 것을 안 이상 마지막으로 배웅하고 싶습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_37.english: Seeing me off... I see you have no intention of holding me back.

LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_38.english: Yes, that is correct. Now, there is a way to live even without the help of my godmother.
LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_38.korean: 네, 그렇습니다.&n이제 대모 님의 도움이 없어도 살아갈 방법이 있습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_39.english: Haha, I just found someone new to rely on, didn't I?
LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_39.korean: 후후, 그저 새로 의지할 사람을 찾았을 뿐이지 않느냐?

LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_4.english: Within my inner self… another essence… why is Godmother in a place like that?
LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_4.korean: 저의 내면 속… 또 다른 본질…&n그런 곳에 어째서 대모 님이?

LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_40.english: Just like before, you will likely live again, relying on others and conforming to their will.
LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_40.korean: 지금까지와 아무것도 다르지 않게.&n너는 또 타인에게 의지하여 그들의 의사에 맞추어 살아가겠지.

LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_41.english: Nothing changed, nothing improved, and nothing got better.
LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_41.korean: 아무것도 변하지 않고, 아무것도 달라지지 않고, 아무것도 나아지지 않았어.

LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_42.english: It's okay. That is... who I am.

LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_44.english: I'm sorry. I only smiled because I was happy.

LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_45.english: Right, it looks like a 'godmother' is no longer needed.
LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_45.korean: 그래, '대모'는 이제 더 이상 필요 없는 모양이구나.

LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_47.english: I want to continue meeting with my godmother. I want to continue talking like this in the future.
LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_47.korean: 대모님과는 계속 만나고 싶습니다.&n앞으로도 이렇게 이야기하고 싶습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_48.english: You rascal, after saying such a cool thing, how pathetic.
LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_48.korean: 이녀석, 기껏 멋지게 말해놓고 아무리가 한심하구나.

LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_49.english: I am no longer needed by you. Shake off any lingering attachment.
LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_49.korean: 네게 이제 난 필요 없는 존재란다.&n미련은 떨쳐내거라.

LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_5.english: Hehe, doesn't my baby already know?
LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_5.korean: 후후, 우리 아가라면 이미 알고 있지 않니?

LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_51.english: Well then, it's time to part ways.

LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_52.english: Are you going to leave like this?

LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_53.english: I was something that never existed from the beginning. An illusion you created. I was nothing more than a tool to maintain your false beliefs.
LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_53.korean: 나는 처음부터 존재하지 않았던 것.&n네가 만들어낸 환상. 너에게 거짓된 신념을 유지하기 위한 도구에 지나지 않았단다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_54.english: I have been able to live until now because of you.
LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_54.korean: 전 당신이 있었기 때문에 지금까지 살 수 있었습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_55.english: I have gained the confidence to live without you, but could you please continue to appear before me in the future?
LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_55.korean: 당신 없이 살아갈 자신은 얻었지만, 앞으로도 제 앞에 나타나주시면 안 되겠습니까?

LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_56.english: Hahaha... You're still such a child full of lingering regrets.

LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_57.english: I will turn around now. You walk forward.
LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_57.korean: 나는 이만 뒤돌아서마. 너는 앞으로 걸어가거라.

LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_59.english: Don't worry. That man will come out to meet you soon, now that you're all alone.
LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_59.korean: 걱정 말거라.&n이제 곧 그 남자가 혼자 남은 널 마중 나올 게다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_6.english: Another self… my true self… I thought there was nothing deep inside me.
LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_6.korean: 또 다른 자신… 진실된 모습…&n전, 내면 깊숙한 곳엔 아무것도 없다고 생각했습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_60.english: You will no longer be cast alone into the darkness. So, now, move away from me and walk forward.
LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_60.korean: 더 이상 어둠 속에 혼자 내던져질 일은 없을 거란다.&n그러니, 이제 나에게서 멀어져 앞으로 걸어가거라.

LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_63.english: Butterfly! Are you okay? Do you recognize me?

LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_65.english: That's a relief. I was worried because you suddenly collapsed. Are you feeling okay?

LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_66.english: I'm fine. I've just lost a little energy.
LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_66.korean: 저는 괜찮습니다.&n다만 조금 힘이 빠졌을 뿐입니다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_67.english: … I apologize for leaving the operation area without permission. I will accept any punishment.

LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_68.english: It's okay. You didn't escape because you wanted to, did you?
LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_68.korean: 괜찮아. 네가 원해서 벗어난 게 아니잖아?

LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_69.english: … The Commander is really kind. It’s easy to put it another way.

LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_7.english: Then it means you have nothing.

LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_70.english: I'll take that as a compliment.

LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_71.english: Commander, may I ask one question... no... I will ask a question.

LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_73.english: What kind of person am I to you, Commander?

LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_74.english: I don't think that's a question you should ask someone you haven't known for that long...
LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_74.korean: 만난 지 그렇게 오래되지 않은 사람한테 할 질문은 아닌 거 같은데…

LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_75.english: I want to know because it hasn't been long since we met. I would like to hear your answer, Commander.
LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_75.korean: 만난 지 오래되지 않았기 때문에 알고 싶은 것입니다.&n사령관님의 대답을 듣고 싶습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_76.english: … Butterfly, you might think of yourself as someone who is sufficient with just orders. You might be hoping not to change.
LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_76.korean: …나비, 너는 자신을 명령만 있으면 충분한 존재라고 생각할지도 몰라.&n변화하지 않기를 바라고 있을지도 모르지.

LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_77.english: But I will continue to demand that you change. So that you move forward with your own will, rather than being a puppet that merely follows orders.
LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_77.korean: 하지만 나는 너에게 변화하기를 계속 요구할 거야.&n명령만을 따르는 꼭두각시 인형이 아닌, 스르로 의지를 갖고 나아가도록.

LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_78.english: You are precious and necessary just by being by my side. So I hope you stay with me.
LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_78.korean: 너는 곁에 있어 주는 것만으로도 소중하고 필요한 존재야.&n그러니까 함께 있어주었으면 해.

LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_79.english: Then, will you give me orders from now on?
LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_79.korean: 그럼, 앞으로 저에게 명령해 주실 겁니까?

LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_8.english: All that exists within you is an empty jar. Those who tell you to change are, in the end, denying your very existence.
LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_8.korean: 네 안에 존재하는 것은 텅 비어버린 항아리뿐.&n변화하라 말하는 자들은, 결국 네 존재를 부정한 거란다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_80.english: I won't give you orders. But I will ask you for a favor.
LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_80.korean: 명령은 하지 않아.&n하지만 부탁은 할 거야.

LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_83.english: ...Commander, I have a favor to ask.

LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_84.english: It’s rare for a butterfly to ask for a favor. What is it?

LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_85.english: … I would like to continue serving as your subordinate, Commander.

LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_86.english: Please allow me to stay by your side.
LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_86.korean: 제가 곁에 머무를 수 있도록 허락해주세요.

LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_87.english: You're talking nonsense. Nabi has been a member of our Orca from the beginning, hasn't she?
LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_87.korean: 이상한 소리를 하네?&n나비는 처음부터 우리 오르카의 일원이었잖아?

LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_88.english: It's only natural that I stay by your side.

LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_89.english: Haha, yes, that is absolutely true. Nothing has changed.
LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_89.korean: 후후, 네 정말 그렇습니다.&n변한 건 아무것도 없습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_9.english: Yes… I can’t do anything. Even if you tell me to change… I don’t even know how.
LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_9.korean: 네… 전 아무것도 할 수 없습니다.&n달라지라고 해도… 방법조차 모릅니다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_90.english: … I will not change that much in the future either.

LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_91.english: Steel Line Unit, assemble! We are beginning our new mission!
LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_91.korean: 스틸 라인 부대, 집합!&n지금부터 새로운 임무에 들어간다!

LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_92.english: Make sure everyone keeps up so you don't fall behind!

LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_93.english: Ugh... It hasn't been long since the last mission ended, and now there's another one... I really don't know when this will ever end.
LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_93.korean: 으으… 임무가 끝난 지 얼마 되지도 않았는데 또 임무임다…&n대체 언제 끝나는지 모르겠슴다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_94.english: If it doesn't end, we won't part ways, so isn't that a good thing? 'Sergeant Brownie?'
LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_94.korean: 끝나지 않으면 헤어지지도 않으니 좋은 게 아니겠어요?&n'브라우니 병장님?'

LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_95.english: Ugh... Leprechaun Squad Leader, please just forget about that...
LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_95.korean: 윽… 레프리콘 분대장님 그 일은 이제 그만 잊어주시지 말임다…

LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_96.english: Ahaha, our home is right here in Orca anyway, isn't it? I'm happy that I can continue doing missions with everyone like this!
LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_96.korean: 아하하, 애초에 우리의 집은 여기 오르카 잖아요?&n이렇게 계속 모두와 임무를 할 수 있다는 게 저는 기뻐요!

LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_97.english: Staff Sergeant Lee Nabi! We have to leave soon!
LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_97.korean: 이나비 하사님! 이제 곧, 출발해야 합니다!

LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_98.english: Yes, I'll be there right now!

LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_99.english: I have lived relying solely on my godmother until now.
LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_99.korean: 저는 지금까지 줄곧 대모님만을 의지하여 살아왔습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-5OP_1.english: think Staff Sergeant Lee Nabi has changed a lot compared to when we first met, Your Excellency.
LastCorruptedRecord4-5OP_1.korean: 이나비 하사는 처음 만났을 때와 비교하면, 지금은 많이 달라졌다고 생각합니다. 각하.

LastCorruptedRecord4-5OP_10.english: Then, as planned, the next mission is… hmm?

LastCorruptedRecord4-5OP_11.english: - Marie closed her mouth, as if sensing something was off.
LastCorruptedRecord4-5OP_11.korean: - 마리는 무언가 이상함을 감지했는지 입을 다물었다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-5OP_12.english: Your Excellency, the Watcher's connection to Sergeant Lee Nabi has been severed…
LastCorruptedRecord4-5OP_12.korean: 각하, 이나비 하사에게 붙여둔 주시자의 연결이 끊어졌습니다…

LastCorruptedRecord4-5OP_13.english: Commander! Captain Marie! It's a big problem.

LastCorruptedRecord4-5OP_15.english: Staff Sergeant Lee Nabi... is nowhere to be seen!

LastCorruptedRecord4-5OP_16.english: [c][00FF00][A blank space has occurred. Citizens, please evacuate immediately in accordance with the emergency manual.][-][/c]
LastCorruptedRecord4-5OP_16.korean: [c][00FF00][공백이 발생하였습니다. 시민 여러분은 비상 매뉴얼에 따라 즉시 대피하시기 바랍니다.][-][/c]

LastCorruptedRecord4-5OP_17.english: A blank has appeared! Everyone run away!!

LastCorruptedRecord4-5OP_19.english: I ended up living all alone... I'm sorry... I'm sorry...

LastCorruptedRecord4-5OP_2.english: I became able to express my opinions clearly, and above all, I started to think about my colleagues.
LastCorruptedRecord4-5OP_2.korean: 자기 의견을 분명하게 말할 수 있게 되었고, 무엇보다 동료들을 생각하기 시작했습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-5OP_20.english: My poor child... You've been through so much.

LastCorruptedRecord4-5OP_22.english: You don't need to think about anything. Sleep peacefully.

LastCorruptedRecord4-5OP_23.english: I will let you know how it started and how it ended.
LastCorruptedRecord4-5OP_23.korean: 시작이 어땠는지, 끝이 어땠는지는 내가 알려줄게요.

LastCorruptedRecord4-5OP_24.english: Don't think about anything inside the chrysalis right now.
LastCorruptedRecord4-5OP_24.korean: 지금은 번데기 속에서 아무 생각 말아요.

LastCorruptedRecord4-5OP_25.english: If you close your eyes for just a moment, you will soon become a colorful butterfly…
LastCorruptedRecord4-5OP_25.korean: 조금만 눈을 감고 있으면 곧 화려한 나비가 되어…

LastCorruptedRecord4-5OP_27.english: Captain, I found you! It's Staff Sergeant Lee Nabi!

LastCorruptedRecord4-5OP_28.english: Sergeant Lee Nabi! Can you hear me!? If you can, answer me!
LastCorruptedRecord4-5OP_28.korean: 이나비 하사! 내 말이 들리나!?&n들린다면 대답해라!

LastCorruptedRecord4-5OP_3.english: Haha, I was surprised when Your Excellency asked for my help... but I never imagined I would end up in virtual reality again.
LastCorruptedRecord4-5OP_3.korean: 후후, 각하께서 도움을 요청하셨을 때는 놀랐지만… 설마 다시 가상 현실에 들어오게 될 줄은 몰랐습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-5OP_30.english: Hehe... My dear. It's been a while since I've seen you fight with all your might.
LastCorruptedRecord4-5OP_30.korean: 후후… 아가야.&n오랜만에 네가 있는 힘껏 싸우는 모습을 보고 싶구나.

LastCorruptedRecord4-5OP_31.english: My dear, my lovely little one. Tell me what you really want.
LastCorruptedRecord4-5OP_31.korean: 아가, 사랑스러운 아가.&n네가 정말로 원하는 걸 말해보려무나.

LastCorruptedRecord4-5OP_32.english: I… would like to receive an order. I would like to pledge my loyalty. Matriarch, please give me an order.
LastCorruptedRecord4-5OP_32.korean: 저는… 명령을 받고 싶습니다.&n충성을 바치고 싶습니다.&n대모 님, 명령을 내려주십시오.

LastCorruptedRecord4-5OP_33.english: Now, destroy everything you see before your eyes.
LastCorruptedRecord4-5OP_33.korean: 자, 네 눈앞에 보이는 모든 것을 없애거라.

LastCorruptedRecord4-5OP_34.english: Show this old woman all your strength.
LastCorruptedRecord4-5OP_34.korean: 이 할미에게 네 모든 힘을 보여주렴.

LastCorruptedRecord4-5OP_36.english: Sergeant Lee Nabi! Snap out of it! What you are seeing is an illusion!
LastCorruptedRecord4-5OP_36.korean: 이나비 하사! 정신 차려라!&n네가 보고 있는 건 환상이다!

LastCorruptedRecord4-5OP_37.korean: 대모 님의 명령… 대모 님의 명령…

LastCorruptedRecord4-5OP_38.english: Your Excellency, it seems you are experiencing hallucinations in addition to brainwashing. A battle is unavoidable.
LastCorruptedRecord4-5OP_38.korean: 각하, 세뇌에 이어 환각까지 보고 있는 듯합니다.&n전투를 피할 수 없겠습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-5OP_4.english: If you are talking about an illusion, you mean the 'Godmother' who appears whenever Sergeant Lee Nabi 'talks to herself'.
LastCorruptedRecord4-5OP_4.korean: 환상이라면, 이나비 하사가 ‘혼잣말’을 할 때마다 나타난다는 ‘대모’ 말씀이군요.

LastCorruptedRecord4-5OP_40.english: - Nabi, wait. I'll save you soon. Don't let brainwashing get to you.
LastCorruptedRecord4-5OP_40.korean: - 나비, 기다려. 곧 내가 구해줄 테니까. 세뇌 따위에 지지 마.

LastCorruptedRecord4-5OP_42.english: It was difficult for me to handle that fantasy on my own.
LastCorruptedRecord4-5OP_42.korean: 나 혼자서는 그 환상을 어떻게 하기가 어려웠거든.

LastCorruptedRecord4-5OP_43.english: I feel the same way. That is why I definitely want to free Nabi from brainwashing.
LastCorruptedRecord4-5OP_43.korean: 나도 마찬가지야. 그래서 나비를 반드시 세뇌에서 해방시키고 싶어.

LastCorruptedRecord4-5OP_45.english: [I guess it can't be helped. I'll give you instructions. Please take care of the butterfly.]
LastCorruptedRecord4-5OP_45.korean: [어쩔 수 없나, 지시를 내릴게. 나비를 부탁해.]

LastCorruptedRecord4-5OP_5.english: They brainwash and provoke traumatized children to instill the belief of 'obedience,' raising them as Soulworkers…
LastCorruptedRecord4-5OP_5.korean: 트라우마를 지닌 아이들을 세뇌하고 자극해 ‘복종’이라는 신념을 심어, 소울워커로 길러낸다…

LastCorruptedRecord4-5OP_6.english: It is a terrible thing that I don't want to believe, and can't believe.
LastCorruptedRecord4-5OP_6.korean: 믿고 싶지도 않고, 믿을 수도 없는 끔찍한 일입니다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-5OP_7.english: When the sergeant first said that she "fights for orders," I thought that was "loyalty."
LastCorruptedRecord4-5OP_7.korean: 처음에 하사가 ‘명령을 위해 싸운다’고 했을 때, 저는 그것이 곧 ‘충심’이라 생각했습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-5OP_8.english: However… to think that innocent children have been locked up and brainwashed for so long… I feel disillusioned.
LastCorruptedRecord4-5OP_8.korean: 하지만… 죄 없는 아이들을 오랫동안 가둬 세뇌하다니… 환멸을 느낍니다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-5OP_9.english: feel the same way, Your Excellency. After all, Sergeant Lee Nabi is now no different from a member of our Steel Line unit.
LastCorruptedRecord4-5OP_9.korean: 저 또한 그렇습니다. 각하.&n이나비 하사는 이제 저희 스틸 라인 부대원과 다름없으니까요.

LastCorruptedRecord4-5SUBED_10.english: Oh, yes! When you were over there… you treated me well.
LastCorruptedRecord4-5SUBED_10.korean: 앗, 네! 저쪽에 있었을 때… 저한테 잘해줬어요.

LastCorruptedRecord4-5SUBED_14.english: What do you like? Do you have any hobbies?
LastCorruptedRecord4-5SUBED_14.korean: 넌 뭘 좋아하지? 취미 같은 게 있나?

LastCorruptedRecord4-5SUBED_15.english: I don't know if I should call it a hobby... I like collecting character stickers.
LastCorruptedRecord4-5SUBED_15.korean: 취미라고 해야 할지… 캐릭터 스티커 모으는 걸 좋아해요.

LastCorruptedRecord4-5SUBED_17.english: Yes, these are stickers with cute characters drawn on them like this. Oh, this one is called Gruguru Seal, and it's a character I like.
LastCorruptedRecord4-5SUBED_17.korean: 네, 이런 식으로 귀여운 캐릭터가 그려진 스티커예요.&n아, 이건 그루그루씰이라고 제가 좋아하는 캐릭터예요.

LastCorruptedRecord4-5SUBED_19.english: It's nothing. I just checked, just in case.

LastCorruptedRecord4-5SUBED_21.english: Ah, you were here. Both of you came early.
LastCorruptedRecord4-5SUBED_21.korean: 아, 여기 있었네.&n두 사람 다 일찍 왔네요.

LastCorruptedRecord4-5SUBED_23.english: Hello, Meropé. We were talking about hobbies.

LastCorruptedRecord4-5SUBED_24.english: Hobbies? Gamma, why are you curious about Dhana's hobbies?
LastCorruptedRecord4-5SUBED_24.korean: 취미? 감마 님 다나의 취미가 왜 궁금하세요?

LastCorruptedRecord4-5SUBED_25.english: There is a bad precedent, you see. Well, it’s nothing.
LastCorruptedRecord4-5SUBED_25.korean: 안 좋은 선례가 있어서 말이지.&n뭐, 아무것도 아니다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-5SUBED_26.english: More importantly, Merope, what did you call me for today? Surely you aren't planning to introduce a new friend.
LastCorruptedRecord4-5SUBED_26.korean: 그보다 메로페, 오늘은 무슨 일로 날 부른 거지?&n설마 새로운 친구를 소개하려는 건 아닐 테고.

LastCorruptedRecord4-5SUBED_27.english: That's right. I'm planning to introduce Dhana to Gamma.
LastCorruptedRecord4-5SUBED_27.korean: 그게 맞아요.&n감마 님에게 다나를 소개해 드리려고요.

LastCorruptedRecord4-5SUBED_29.english: Gamma, you don't know many people in Orca, do you? How about spending some time with new people once in a while?
LastCorruptedRecord4-5SUBED_29.korean: 감마 님, 오르카 안에서 알고 지내는 사람이 많지 않잖아요?&n가끔은 새로운 사람들이랑 같이 시간을 보내보는 건 어떠세요?

LastCorruptedRecord4-5SUBED_30.english: Hmph, how boring. If that's the case, I'll go back.

LastCorruptedRecord4-5SUBED_31.english: Meropé! I'm here! Oh, hello Gamma too!
LastCorruptedRecord4-5SUBED_31.korean: 메로페 님! 저 왔어요!&n앗, 감마 님도 안녕하세요!

LastCorruptedRecord4-5SUBED_32.english: Rhode? What's up with you again?

LastCorruptedRecord4-5SUBED_33.english: What do you mean, what's wrong? Gamma called you, didn't she?

LastCorruptedRecord4-5SUBED_35.english: Yes! Merope said that Gamma would buy us cake today!
LastCorruptedRecord4-5SUBED_35.korean: 네! 감마 님께서 오늘 케이크를 사주신다고 메로페 님이 말했는 걸요!

LastCorruptedRecord4-5SUBED_38.english: Phew... Rhode, that's a shame, but I never said that.
LastCorruptedRecord4-5SUBED_38.korean: 후… 로데 아쉽지만, 나는 그런 말을 한 적이 없다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-5SUBED_39.english: What!? No...? Waaah... I came here expecting something...

LastCorruptedRecord4-5SUBED_41.english: I was really looking forward to this... *sobbing*

LastCorruptedRecord4-5SUBED_42.english: Haa... Got it. Got it, so don't cry.

LastCorruptedRecord4-5SUBED_43.english: Really? Hooray! Gamma is the best!

LastCorruptedRecord4-5SUBED_44.english: Excuse me, Meropé. Is it okay for me to be here?
LastCorruptedRecord4-5SUBED_44.korean: 저기, 메로페.&n제가 여기 있어도 괜찮은 건가요?

LastCorruptedRecord4-5SUBED_45.english: Yes, of course. That's fine, right, Gamma?

LastCorruptedRecord4-5SUBED_46.english: It probably won't change anything if one more person is added now.
LastCorruptedRecord4-5SUBED_46.korean: 이제 와서 한 명 더 늘어난다고 달라질 건 없겠지.

LastCorruptedRecord4-5SUBED_49.english: Let's eat together! Oh, my name is Rhode!

LastCorruptedRecord4-5SUBED_51.english: Dhana, I look forward to working with you!

LastCorruptedRecord4-5SUBED_52.english: It is not often that I treat someone. Please do not decline.
LastCorruptedRecord4-5SUBED_52.korean: 이 내가 누군가에게 대접하는 건 흔치 않은 일이다.&n사양하지 마라.

LastCorruptedRecord4-5SUBED_53.english: Oh, yes! Thank you, I'll enjoy it.

LastCorruptedRecord4-5SUBED_54.english: But would it be okay if I didn't invite Merlin?
LastCorruptedRecord4-5SUBED_54.korean: 근데 멀린 님은 부르지 않아도 괜찮을까요?

LastCorruptedRecord4-5SUBED_55.english: Well, that guy is probably busy with her usual routine, as always. Rhode, don't end up like her.
LastCorruptedRecord4-5SUBED_55.korean: 뭐, 그 녀석이라면 언제나처럼 늘상 하던 일로 바쁘겠지.&n로데, 너는 그 녀석처럼 되지 마라.

LastCorruptedRecord4-5SUBED_61.english: Um... I look forward to working with you in the future.

LastCorruptedRecord4-5SUBED_62.korean: 네! 오르카에 온 걸 환영해요, 다나!

LastCorruptedRecord4-6ED_10.english: Poi? Where did you suddenly go without saying a word?
LastCorruptedRecord4-6ED_10.korean: 포이?&n말도 없이 갑자기 어디로 가버린 거람.

LastCorruptedRecord4-6ED_11.english: I followed along because they suddenly said there was somewhere they wanted to go together...
LastCorruptedRecord4-6ED_11.korean: 갑자기 같이 가보고 싶은 곳이 있다 해서 따라왔는데…

LastCorruptedRecord4-6ED_12.english: It can't be helped. It was Poi who disappeared on her own accord. I'll just go back to my room and take a nap...
LastCorruptedRecord4-6ED_12.korean: 어쩔 수 없죠. 멋대로 사라진 건 포이니까.&n이대로 방으로 돌아가서 낮잠이나…

LastCorruptedRecord4-6ED_13.english: … Ah, Poi’s scent… She’s nearby. But… this familiar smell…?
LastCorruptedRecord4-6ED_13.korean: …아, 포이의 냄새… 근처에 있군요.&n그런데… 익숙한 이 냄새는…?

LastCorruptedRecord4-6ED_16.english: Hehe, Master... are you going to keep sleeping like that? With Poi right here beside you...
LastCorruptedRecord4-6ED_16.korean: 후훗, 주인님… 그렇게 계속 잠들어 있으실 건가요?&n포이가 이렇게 옆에 있는데…

LastCorruptedRecord4-6ED_17.english: It can't be helped. Then, so that Master can 'wake up in a good mood'...
LastCorruptedRecord4-6ED_17.korean: 어쩔 수 없네요.&n그럼 포이가 주인님이 '기분 좋게 일어나실 수' 있도록…

LastCorruptedRecord4-6ED_20.english: Who are you bothering! Master is sleeping, so don't disturb him and get away.
LastCorruptedRecord4-6ED_20.korean: 누가 방해꾼이에요!&n주인님 주무시고 계시니까 방해하지 말고 떨어지세요.

LastCorruptedRecord4-6ED_21.english: Sister Perrault, actually, Master might not be sleeping~?
LastCorruptedRecord4-6ED_21.korean: 페로 언니, 사실 주인님 안 주무시는 걸지도 몰라요~?

LastCorruptedRecord4-6ED_22.english: What? What do you mean... It certainly is strange to be sleeping in a place like this. And what you're wearing on your head, too...
LastCorruptedRecord4-6ED_22.korean: 네? 그게 무슨…&n확실히 이런 곳에서 주무시는 건 이상하네요. 머리에 쓰신 것도 그렇고…

LastCorruptedRecord4-6ED_23.english: Ah, by any chance this is what Master has recently shown interest in…
LastCorruptedRecord4-6ED_23.korean: 아, 혹시 이게 주인님이 최근에 흥미를 보이셨던…

LastCorruptedRecord4-6ED_24.english: I’ll put this on my head… Hehe~ Next to Master is my spot~♪
LastCorruptedRecord4-6ED_24.korean: 이걸… 머리에 쓰고…&n헤헤~ 주인님 옆은 제 자리에요~♪

LastCorruptedRecord4-6ED_25.english: Ah, Poi! Get away right now!

LastCorruptedRecord4-6ED_29.english: Perrault's gaze fell on the helmet lying nearby.
LastCorruptedRecord4-6ED_29.korean: 페로는 옆에 놓여있는 헬멧에 눈길이 갔다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-6ED_3.english: Why are the two of you here?
LastCorruptedRecord4-6ED_3.korean: 두 사람이 왜 여기에 있는 거야?

LastCorruptedRecord4-6ED_30.english: … So, this is because we have to bring Poi here so she can't interfere with Master!
LastCorruptedRecord4-6ED_30.korean: …이건 그러니까 그거에요.&n포이가 주인님을 방해하지 못하게 데려와야 하니까요!

LastCorruptedRecord4-6ED_31.english: Perrault put the helmet that was lying there on her head.
LastCorruptedRecord4-6ED_31.korean: 페로는 놓여 있는 헬멧을 머리에 썼다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-6ED_32.english: M-Master, the seat next to you... excuse me...

LastCorruptedRecord4-6ED_34.korean: 그렇게 잠시 후, 가상 현실 속.

LastCorruptedRecord4-6ED_35.english: So, in the end, both of them just walked into virtual reality on their own accord.
LastCorruptedRecord4-6ED_35.korean: 결국 두 사람 다 멋대로 가상 현실로 들어온 거네.

LastCorruptedRecord4-6ED_38.english: (Lilith should have been on security today... The fact that the two of them walked in like this means they must have just let them in. The Doctor said she was busy today and would only be doing remote monitoring, too...)
LastCorruptedRecord4-6ED_38.korean: (오늘 경호 담당은 리리스였을 텐데… 두 사람이 이렇게 들어왔다는 건, 그냥 들여보내 준 거겠지.&n닥터도 오늘은 바빠서 원격 모니터링만 한다고 했고…)

LastCorruptedRecord4-6ED_39.english: In that case, we would be a hindrance, so we will return as is. We are truly sorry, Master...
LastCorruptedRecord4-6ED_39.korean: 그럼 저희는 방해가 될 테니 이대로 돌아가겠습니다.&n정말 죄송합니다, 주인님….

LastCorruptedRecord4-6ED_41.english: Both of you, wait a moment.

LastCorruptedRecord4-6ED_43.english: I happened to need help. I was thinking of borrowing both of your hands like this; would that be okay?
LastCorruptedRecord4-6ED_43.korean: 마침 도움이 필요했어.&n이대로 두 사람의 손을 빌릴까 하는데 괜찮을까?

LastCorruptedRecord4-6ED_46.english: Leave it to me! Master! Yes! Alright! Master!

LastCorruptedRecord4-6SUBED_1.english: Hey! Where is that bastard! You treat me like this just because I've been nice?
LastCorruptedRecord4-6SUBED_1.korean: 야! 그 자식 어디 있어!&n사람이 좋게좋게 있으니까 이딴 식으로 대접을 해?

LastCorruptedRecord4-6SUBED_10.english: Of course, I get canned tuna too. Not just me, but all the Orca members.
LastCorruptedRecord4-6SUBED_10.korean: 그야 저도 참치캔으로 받거든요.&n저뿐만 아니라 오르카 대원 전부요.

LastCorruptedRecord4-6SUBED_11.english: What did you say... You mean a place called Orca exploits people for tuna cans instead of money?
LastCorruptedRecord4-6SUBED_11.korean: 뭐라고라고라… 오르카라는 곳은 사람을 돈이 아니라 참치캔으로 부려먹는단 말이야?

LastCorruptedRecord4-6SUBED_14.english: Did you get canned tuna today too, Ephnel? I just got mine, and I got a lot more than usual.
LastCorruptedRecord4-6SUBED_14.korean: 에프넬도 오늘 참치캔 받은 거야?&n나도 방금 막 받았는데 평소보다 많이 받았어.

LastCorruptedRecord4-6SUBED_15.english: Yes, because we had a lot of missions last month.

LastCorruptedRecord4-6SUBED_16.english: I happened to want to buy something, so this is perfect.
LastCorruptedRecord4-6SUBED_16.korean: 마침 사고 싶던 게 있었는데 잘됐다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-6SUBED_17.english: I'm going to buy a new coat too. Since it's the coat Ullr wears... I'll get a wool coat!
LastCorruptedRecord4-6SUBED_17.korean: 나도 신상 코트를 살 거야.&n우르가 입는 코트니까… 울 코트로!

LastCorruptedRecord4-6SUBED_2.english: If that's how it's going to be, then fine with it! I'll show you exactly what happens when you exploit people for passion pay!
LastCorruptedRecord4-6SUBED_2.korean: 그렇게 나온다면 나도 좋다 이거야!&n사람을 열정페이로 부려먹으면 어떻게 되는지 똑똑히 알려주겠어!

LastCorruptedRecord4-6SUBED_20.english: I plan to save money for the time being.

LastCorruptedRecord4-6SUBED_21.english: What... are you really using canned tuna like money?
LastCorruptedRecord4-6SUBED_21.korean: 뭐야… 정말로 참치캔을 돈처럼 사용하고 있다고?

LastCorruptedRecord4-6SUBED_22.english: Are you telling me to accept this situation?
LastCorruptedRecord4-6SUBED_22.korean: 지금 이 상황을 나더러 납득하란 말이야?

LastCorruptedRecord4-6SUBED_23.english: If you are so skeptical, why don't you try using it yourself while you're at it?
LastCorruptedRecord4-6SUBED_23.korean: 그렇게 못 미더우시면 이참에 직접 사용해 보는 건 어떠신가요?

LastCorruptedRecord4-6SUBED_24.english: Okay, I'm going to see if I can really buy something with this!
LastCorruptedRecord4-6SUBED_24.korean: 좋아, 이걸로 정말 물건을 살 수 있는지 확인해 보겠어!

LastCorruptedRecord4-6SUBED_25.english: By the way, is there anything you would like to buy?

LastCorruptedRecord4-6SUBED_26.english: Something I want to buy? Of course I do.
LastCorruptedRecord4-6SUBED_26.korean: 사고 싶은 거? 그야 물론 있지.

LastCorruptedRecord4-6SUBED_27.english: Give me all the meatballs here!

LastCorruptedRecord4-6SUBED_28.english: I'm planning to pay with the can of tuna here...

LastCorruptedRecord4-6SUBED_29.english: Thank you. Please use our services again.

LastCorruptedRecord4-6SUBED_30.english: Huh? Is this really okay? This... it's a can of tuna?
LastCorruptedRecord4-6SUBED_30.korean: 엥? 정말 이걸로 괜찮아? 이거... 참치캔인데?

LastCorruptedRecord4-6SUBED_33.english: Ephnel? Is something wrong? With such a serious expression, piling up a huge pile of meatballs?
LastCorruptedRecord4-6SUBED_33.korean: 에프넬? 무슨 일 있어?&n그렇게 심각한 표정으로 미트볼을 잔뜩 쌓아두고?

LastCorruptedRecord4-6SUBED_34.english: No, well... I have something to think about.
LastCorruptedRecord4-6SUBED_34.korean: 아니 뭐… 조금 생각할 게 있어서.

LastCorruptedRecord4-6SUBED_35.english: Come to think of it, today was your first paycheck, right? Just in case you were wondering, keep the canned tuna safe.
LastCorruptedRecord4-6SUBED_35.korean: 그러고 보니 오늘 첫 급료였지?&n혹시나 해서 말하는데, 참치캔은 잘 간수해.

LastCorruptedRecord4-6SUBED_36.english: Someone might take it and eat it.

LastCorruptedRecord4-6SUBED_37.english: It's not like I'm working for free, so I guess that's fine... The meatballs are tasty...
LastCorruptedRecord4-6SUBED_37.korean: 열정페이는 아니니까, 뭐 됐나… 미트볼 맛있네…

LastCorruptedRecord4-6SUBED_4.english: What do you mean, what's going on! Just get ready to clean up the corpses! Do you know how much I've been waiting for today?
LastCorruptedRecord4-6SUBED_4.korean: 무슨 일이긴! 송장 치울 준비나 해!&n오늘을 내가 얼~마나 기다렸는지 알아?

LastCorruptedRecord4-6SUBED_5.english: If it's today... Ah, so it's the day Ephnel receives her first paycheck from Orca.
LastCorruptedRecord4-6SUBED_5.korean: 오늘이라면…&n아, 에프넬 씨가 처음으로 오르카에서 급료를 받는 날이군요.

LastCorruptedRecord4-6SUBED_6.english: By any chance, was the quantity insufficient?

LastCorruptedRecord4-6SUBED_7.english: Quantity or not! It wasn't money made of banknotes or coins to begin with!
LastCorruptedRecord4-6SUBED_7.korean: 수량이고 뭐고! 애초에 지폐나 동전으로 된 돈이 아니었다고!

LastCorruptedRecord4-6SUBED_8.english: Yes, it's a can of tuna, isn't it?

LastCorruptedRecord4-6SUBED_9.english: Right! Canned tuna… What? How did you know that?
LastCorruptedRecord4-6SUBED_9.korean: 그래! 참치캔…&n뭐야, 네가 그걸 어떻게 알아?

LastCorruptedRecord4-7ED_1.english: By the way, Master. How can Poi and I help you?
LastCorruptedRecord4-7ED_1.korean: 그런데 주인님.&n저와 포이는 무엇을 도와드리면 될까요?

LastCorruptedRecord4-7ED_10.english: Actually, we've never really had a proper conversation. I tried talking to them a few times, but they ran away every time. They're probably wary of strangers.
LastCorruptedRecord4-7ED_10.korean: 사실 제대로 대화한 적은 없어.&n몇 번 말을 걸긴 했는데, 그때마다 도망쳐 버렸어. 아마 낯선 사람을 경계하는 거겠지.

LastCorruptedRecord4-7ED_12.english: Her name is Chii Aruel. She is a girl with a physique similar to Perrault's.
LastCorruptedRecord4-7ED_12.korean: 이름은 치이 아루엘. 페로와 비슷한 체격의 소녀야.

LastCorruptedRecord4-7ED_14.english: And she called herself a cat.

LastCorruptedRecord4-7ED_16.english: Sniff, sniff… I’ve never smelled this before… ? Ah, it’s coming this way!
LastCorruptedRecord4-7ED_16.korean: 킁킁… 처음 맡아 보는 냄새인데…?&n아, 이쪽으로 온다!

LastCorruptedRecord4-7ED_17.english: Since it's a very agile child, approach slowly so it doesn't run away...
LastCorruptedRecord4-7ED_17.korean: 상당히 날쌘 아이니까, 도망치지 않게 천천히 접근해서…

LastCorruptedRecord4-7ED_2.english: Hmm... that's right. There is someone I'm looking for.

LastCorruptedRecord4-7ED_20.english: My name is Chii Aruel! And I'm a cat just like you guys!
LastCorruptedRecord4-7ED_20.korean: 내 이름은 치이 아루엘! 그리고 너희들이랑 똑같은 고양이야!

LastCorruptedRecord4-7ED_22.english: Huh...? Um, I mean... it's Perrault.

LastCorruptedRecord4-7ED_25.english: I never thought I would meet a cat that looks exactly like me…
LastCorruptedRecord4-7ED_25.korean: 나랑 똑같이 생긴 고양이를 만날 거라고 생각하지 않았는데…

LastCorruptedRecord4-7ED_26.english: You know, I want to know more about Perrault and Poi!
LastCorruptedRecord4-7ED_26.korean: 있잖아, 페로와 포이에 대해서 더 알고 싶어!

LastCorruptedRecord4-7ED_28.english: Master! There's a kid who looks interesting!

LastCorruptedRecord4-7ED_29.english: Um... well, that kid is the person I was looking for... I didn't expect them to approach me first like this so suddenly.
LastCorruptedRecord4-7ED_29.korean: 어… 일단 그 아이가 내가 찾던 사람인데...&n갑자기 이렇게 먼저 다가와 줄 줄은 몰랐네.

LastCorruptedRecord4-7ED_3.english: The person you are looking for? In virtual reality, you mean?
LastCorruptedRecord4-7ED_3.korean: 찾고 있는 사람? 가상 현실 속에서 말인가요?

LastCorruptedRecord4-7ED_31.english: Master! I completed the mission, so please give me a reward!

LastCorruptedRecord4-7ED_32.english: … Do Perrault and Poi like the Commander?

LastCorruptedRecord4-7ED_33.english: What!? Why are you suddenly asking such a question…!

LastCorruptedRecord4-7ED_34.english: Yeah! I like you! I like you so much!

LastCorruptedRecord4-7ED_35.english: So, Perrault and Foy become the Commander's wives later, right?
LastCorruptedRecord4-7ED_35.korean: 그럼 페로와 포이는 나중에 사령관의 아내가 되는 거지?

LastCorruptedRecord4-7ED_36.english: Th-that... why are you curious about that!?
LastCorruptedRecord4-7ED_36.korean: 그, 그건… 왜 그런 게 궁금한 건가요!?

LastCorruptedRecord4-7ED_37.english: Haa... Master... I love you so much...

LastCorruptedRecord4-7ED_38.english: Well, I heard that you just need to make a family with the person you like, right? I also often licked the skin or groomed the fur of the person I liked.
LastCorruptedRecord4-7ED_38.korean: 그야 좋아하는 사람과 가족을 만들면 된다고 들었으니까?&n나도 자주 좋아하는 사람의 피부를 핥거나 털을 골라주기도 했고.

LastCorruptedRecord4-7ED_39.english: In that case, why don't you try staying with us too? It seems like Perrault and Poi have taken a liking to you.
LastCorruptedRecord4-7ED_39.korean: 그렇다면 치이도 우리랑 같이 있어 보는 건 어때?&n페로와 포이는 치이를 마음에 들어한 것 같은데.

LastCorruptedRecord4-7ED_4.english: This is someone you absolutely must meet to clear this virtual reality game.
LastCorruptedRecord4-7ED_4.korean: 이번 가상 현실 게임을 클리어하려면 꼭 만나야 하는 사람이야.

LastCorruptedRecord4-7ED_41.english: Yeah! Poi likes it too! Chii smells good!
LastCorruptedRecord4-7ED_41.korean: 응! 포이도 좋아! 치이에게 좋은 냄새가 나!

LastCorruptedRecord4-7ED_42.english: Yeah! I like Perrault and Poi too! I want to stay with them! I'll even groom their fur~
LastCorruptedRecord4-7ED_42.korean: 응! 나도 페로와 포이가 좋아! 같이 있을래!&n털도 골라줄거야~

LastCorruptedRecord4-7ED_44.english: - And so, somewhat unexpectedly, a meeting with a new cat came to fruition.
LastCorruptedRecord4-7ED_44.korean: - 이렇게 해서 다소 뜬금없지만, 새로운 고양이와의 만남이 성사되었다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-7ED_5.english: Even though I keep trying to approach you, you keep avoiding me.
LastCorruptedRecord4-7ED_5.korean: 계속 다가가려 해도 자꾸 나를 피하고 있거든.

LastCorruptedRecord4-7ED_6.english: I understand! Then I just need to catch that guy and bring her before you, Master, right?
LastCorruptedRecord4-7ED_6.korean: 알겠어요! 그럼 그 녀석을 붙잡아서 주인님 앞으로 끌고 오면 되는 거죠?

LastCorruptedRecord4-7ED_8.english: To think you're avoiding your master... is there a reason for it?
LastCorruptedRecord4-7ED_8.korean: 주인님을 피한다니… 무슨 사정이라도 있는 건가요?

LastCorruptedRecord4-7ED_9.english: Actually, we haven't really talked properly yet. We met a few times and I did strike up a conversation, but...
LastCorruptedRecord4-7ED_9.korean: 사실 아직까지 제대로 이야기 한 적은 없어.&n몇 번 만나서 말을 건네긴 했는데…

LastCorruptedRecord4-7SUBED_1.english: I will finish all my training with this!

LastCorruptedRecord4-7SUBED_11.english: Isn't the training at Steel Line tough?

LastCorruptedRecord4-7SUBED_13.english: Hahaha, I'm so excited that I can't even think straight anymore!
LastCorruptedRecord4-7SUBED_13.korean: 하하하, 너무 신나서 이젠 아무 생각도 안 드는걸?

LastCorruptedRecord4-7SUBED_15.english: Hmm, one person now considers training just part of their daily routine, while the newcomer approaches it with passion…
LastCorruptedRecord4-7SUBED_15.korean: 음, 한 명은 훈련을 이제 일상과 같다고 생각하고, 새로 들어온 한 명은 열정적으로 훈련에 임한다라…

LastCorruptedRecord4-7SUBED_16.english: I'm telling you, the future of our Steel Line unit is dazzlingly bright.
LastCorruptedRecord4-7SUBED_16.korean: 우리 스틸 라인 부대의 앞날이 눈이 부실 정도로 밝다니까.

LastCorruptedRecord4-7SUBED_19.english: How long has it been since you became a Staff Sergeant? A new Staff Sergeant has joined, so it would be good to start getting promoted.
LastCorruptedRecord4-7SUBED_19.korean: 하사가 된지 얼마나 지났지?&n새로운 하사가 들어왔으니 슬슬 진급을 하는 게 좋겠어.

LastCorruptedRecord4-7SUBED_2.english: You all worked hard! Get some good rest. That's all!
LastCorruptedRecord4-7SUBED_2.korean: 모두 고생 많았다! 푹 쉬도록. 이상이다!

LastCorruptedRecord4-7SUBED_20.english: I’ll make a strong recommendation. From now on, write "Sergeant (Jin)" on payment documents.
LastCorruptedRecord4-7SUBED_20.korean: 내가 적극 추천해두지.&n앞으로는 결제 서류에 중사(진)으로 적어두도록.

LastCorruptedRecord4-7SUBED_27.english: I have high expectations for Staff Sergeant Lee Nabi as well. If there is anything you don't know, please don't hesitate to ask.
LastCorruptedRecord4-7SUBED_27.korean: 이나비 하사에게도 큰 기대를 하고 있으니까.&n모르는 게 있다면 사양하지 말고 물어봐도 괜찮아.

LastCorruptedRecord4-7SUBED_28.english: Thank you. I will move forward to live up to your expectations.

LastCorruptedRecord4-7SUBED_29.english: So, right away, I have about ten questions regarding this training.
LastCorruptedRecord4-7SUBED_29.korean: 그럼 바로 이번 훈련에 대해서 질문이 열 가지 정도 있습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-7SUBED_3.english: Phew, it's finally over. I feel this every time, but the training in our Steel Line unit is just too intense...
LastCorruptedRecord4-7SUBED_3.korean: 후으, 드디어 끝났슴다.&n매번 느끼는 거지만, 저희 스틸 라인 부대의 훈련은 너무 강도가 높슴다…

LastCorruptedRecord4-7SUBED_30.english: To think such a talented person would join the Steel Line following a competent successor...
LastCorruptedRecord4-7SUBED_30.korean: 이 정도로 열정적일 줄이야…&n유능한 후임에 이어서 이런 인재가 스틸 라인에 들어오다니…

LastCorruptedRecord4-7SUBED_31.english: Good job, Sergeant Lee Nabi! Ask me anything!

LastCorruptedRecord4-7SUBED_4.english: Don't you think so, Sergeant Lee Nabi, either?

LastCorruptedRecord4-7SUBED_5.english: No, it was a very beneficial training.

LastCorruptedRecord4-7SUBED_6.english: A significant increase in combat power is expected from this training.
LastCorruptedRecord4-7SUBED_6.korean: 이번 훈련으로 매우 높은 전투력 상승이 예상됩니다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-7SUBED_8.english: Brownie… we’re going back to the base now, so get ready.
LastCorruptedRecord4-7SUBED_8.korean: 브라우니… 이제 기지로 돌아갈 거니까 준비하고 있어.

LastCorruptedRecord4-7SUBED_9.english: Ah, got it! But what about Sergeant Efreeti?

LastCorruptedRecord4-8ED_10.english: Are you happy when I kill a lot of Soul Junk?
LastCorruptedRecord4-8ED_10.korean: 너는 내가 소울정크를 많이 죽이면 기뻐?

LastCorruptedRecord4-8ED_13.english: But Soul Junk isn't our only enemy.
LastCorruptedRecord4-8ED_13.korean: 하지만 우리의 적은 소울정크만 있는 게 아니야.

LastCorruptedRecord4-8ED_14.english: The real goal is to create a world where everyone can live well. Defeating Soul Junk is just one part of that process.
LastCorruptedRecord4-8ED_14.korean: 진짜 목표는 모두가 살기 좋은 세상을 만드는 거지.&n소울정크를 쓰러뜨리는 건 그 과정 중 하나일 뿐이야.

LastCorruptedRecord4-8ED_15.english: A world where everyone… is a good place to live…

LastCorruptedRecord4-8ED_16.english: So, thanks for helping me, Chii.

LastCorruptedRecord4-8ED_18.english: First off, the reward for this mission… but…
LastCorruptedRecord4-8ED_18.korean: 일단 이번 임무에 대한 보상… 인데…

LastCorruptedRecord4-8ED_2.english: I killed all the Soul Junk.

LastCorruptedRecord4-8ED_20.english: Oh, sorry. Did you dislike it?

LastCorruptedRecord4-8ED_21.english: Mm, I don't dislike it... Please keep going.

LastCorruptedRecord4-8ED_24.english: … Just petting? What about anything else?

LastCorruptedRecord4-8ED_25.english: Um... since Chii is here this time. I'd like you to bear with this this time.
LastCorruptedRecord4-8ED_25.korean: 어… 이번엔 치이도 있으니까.&n이번에는 이걸로 참아줬으면 좋겠는데.

LastCorruptedRecord4-8ED_27.english: Poi never stops being loved by her master, no matter what happens♡
LastCorruptedRecord4-8ED_27.korean: 포이는 그 어떤 일에도 주인님에게 사랑 받는 걸 멈추지 않아요♡

LastCorruptedRecord4-8ED_28.english: - In the end, I was able to appease Poi with a promise that I would dote on her twice as much later.
LastCorruptedRecord4-8ED_28.korean: - 결국, '나중에 배로 귀여워해 주겠다'는 약속으로 포이를 달랠 수 있었다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-8ED_3.english: Good job to both of you.

LastCorruptedRecord4-8ED_4.english: worked hard for you, Master. So… you’ll love me, right?
LastCorruptedRecord4-8ED_4.korean: 주인님을 위해서 열심히 했어요.&n그러니까… 예뻐해 주실 거죠?

LastCorruptedRecord4-8ED_6.english: That's right! Chii worked hard along with us today too! So please give Chii a reward, too!
LastCorruptedRecord4-8ED_6.korean: 맞아요! 오늘은 치이도 같이 열심히 했어요!&n그러니까 치이한테도 상 주세요!

LastCorruptedRecord4-8ED_7.english: Of course, I intended to do the same for Chii.

LastCorruptedRecord4-8ED_9.english: I hate Soul Junk. So I'm going to keep killing it.
LastCorruptedRecord4-8ED_9.korean: 나는 소울정크가 싫어.&n그래서 앞으로도 계속 죽일 거야.

LastCorruptedRecord4-8OP_1.english: Nya ha ha ha! I'll tear you to shreds!

LastCorruptedRecord4-8OP_12.english: If you complete the mission, you can receive a reward!
LastCorruptedRecord4-8OP_12.korean: 임무를 완수하면 상을 받을 수 있어!

LastCorruptedRecord4-8OP_14.english: Yeah! You can do lots of things that make you feel good!
LastCorruptedRecord4-8OP_14.korean: 응! 기분 좋은 거 잔뜩 할 수 있어!

LastCorruptedRecord4-8OP_15.english: So, let's complete the mission together, Chii, and get a reward from Master!
LastCorruptedRecord4-8OP_15.korean: 그러니까 치이도 같이 임무를 완수하고 주인님한테 상 받자!

LastCorruptedRecord4-8OP_16.english: … Me too? Will the commander give me a prize too?

LastCorruptedRecord4-8OP_17.english: It'll be fine since Master gives rewards to everyone!
LastCorruptedRecord4-8OP_17.korean: 주인님은 모두에게 상을 주시니까 괜찮을 거야!

LastCorruptedRecord4-8OP_18.english: Okay. I'm not entirely sure, but... if it means killing Soul Junk, I'll do whatever it takes.
LastCorruptedRecord4-8OP_18.korean: 알았어.&n잘은 모르겠지만… 소울정크를 죽이는 거라면, 뭐든 열심히 할게.

LastCorruptedRecord4-8OP_2.english: Filthy Soul Junk… I’m going to kill them all!
LastCorruptedRecord4-8OP_2.korean: 더러운 소울정크… 내가 전부 죽일 거야!

LastCorruptedRecord4-8OP_3.english: Nya ha ha ha! It's nothing special. They were easy guys.

LastCorruptedRecord4-8OP_5.english: But Chii is strong too, you know?

LastCorruptedRecord4-8OP_6.english: But Chii... seems to really hate Soul Junk. Is there a special reason for that?
LastCorruptedRecord4-8OP_6.korean: 근데 치이는… 소울정크를 엄청 증오하는 것 같은데, 특별한 이유라도 있어?

LastCorruptedRecord4-8OP_7.english: I… I’m not really sure. But when I look at them, I feel like they just need to disappear.
LastCorruptedRecord4-8OP_7.korean: 그건… 잘은 모르겠어.&n하지만 녀석들을 보면, 그냥 사라져야 한다는 생각이 들어.

LastCorruptedRecord4-8OP_8.english: Kill, and kill again... I'm going to kill until the very end and wipe them all out.
LastCorruptedRecord4-8OP_8.korean: 죽이고, 또 죽이고… 끝까지 죽여서 전부 없애버릴 거야.

LastCorruptedRecord4-8OP_9.english: Why is Poi killing Soul Junk?

LastCorruptedRecord4-8SUBED_10.english: Yeah! I like this place too! Then...

LastCorruptedRecord4-8SUBED_11.english: Vanilla, I'm hungry! I want to eat cake quickly!
LastCorruptedRecord4-8SUBED_11.korean: 바닐라, 나 배고파!&n빨리 케이크 먹고 싶어!

LastCorruptedRecord4-8SUBED_12.english: Happy… you ate a lot earlier, didn't you?

LastCorruptedRecord4-8SUBED_13.english: That isn't enough! I'm still hungry!

LastCorruptedRecord4-8SUBED_14.english: Honestly... it can't be helped. I'll bring it right away, so please wait patiently.
LastCorruptedRecord4-8SUBED_14.korean: 정말이지... 어쩔 수 없네요.&n금방 가져올 테니까 얌전히 기다리고 있어요.

LastCorruptedRecord4-8SUBED_15.english: Understood! I'll be waiting patiently! Hahahahaha!

LastCorruptedRecord4-8SUBED_16.english: … Shall we go to another place?

LastCorruptedRecord4-8SUBED_17.english: I think that would be good...

LastCorruptedRecord4-8SUBED_19.english: I'm sure I'll be able to rest quietly here.
LastCorruptedRecord4-8SUBED_19.korean: 여기라면 분명 조용히 쉴 수 있을 거예요.

LastCorruptedRecord4-8SUBED_2.english: Yeah! It's warm and quiet... I think it's nice!
LastCorruptedRecord4-8SUBED_2.korean: 응! 따뜻하고 조용하고... 좋은 것 같아!

LastCorruptedRecord4-8SUBED_22.english: Of course. I heard a new release came out.

LastCorruptedRecord4-8SUBED_23.english: If you're talking about a new release... is this what you mean?

LastCorruptedRecord4-8SUBED_24.english: Wow…! The Captain is awesome this month, as expected! I mean, the number of works has increased noticeably since joining Orca!
LastCorruptedRecord4-8SUBED_24.korean: 크으…! 이번 달 대장님도 역시 멋져!&n오르카에 합류하고 나서 작품 수가 눈에 띄게 늘었단 말이지!

LastCorruptedRecord4-8SUBED_25.english: Okay, and here is the best shot of the month.
LastCorruptedRecord4-8SUBED_25.korean: 자, 그리고 이게 이번 달의 베스트 샷이야.

LastCorruptedRecord4-8SUBED_26.english: can't believe it... A two-shot of the Captain and Arthur... Thank you, thank you!
LastCorruptedRecord4-8SUBED_26.korean: 이럴 수가… 대장님과 아서의… 투 샷이라고… 감사합니다, 감사합니다!

LastCorruptedRecord4-8SUBED_29.english: Um... so you're saying you went around looking for a place to take a nap but failed every single time?
LastCorruptedRecord4-8SUBED_29.korean: 음… 그러니까 낮잠 잘 곳을 찾아다녔는데 전부 실패했다는 거야?

LastCorruptedRecord4-8SUBED_30.english: For some reason, there was someone everywhere I went today…
LastCorruptedRecord4-8SUBED_30.korean: 어째서인지 오늘은 가는 곳마다 누군가 있어서…

LastCorruptedRecord4-8SUBED_31.english: I'm tired of wandering around looking for it now...

LastCorruptedRecord4-8SUBED_32.english: If that's the case, I know a good place!
LastCorruptedRecord4-8SUBED_32.korean: 그거라면 내가 좋은 곳 알고 있어!

LastCorruptedRecord4-8SUBED_34.english: So that's why you came all the way here looking for a place to rest.
LastCorruptedRecord4-8SUBED_34.korean: 그래서 쉴 장소를 찾아 여기까지 왔다는 거구나.

LastCorruptedRecord4-8SUBED_35.english: I'm sorry, Master. I told you it wouldn't work...

LastCorruptedRecord4-8SUBED_36.english: It's fine, I was planning to take a short break anyway. By the way...
LastCorruptedRecord4-8SUBED_36.korean: 괜찮아, 마침 나도 잠깐 쉴 생각이었으니까.&n그나저나...

LastCorruptedRecord4-8SUBED_38.english: Right? Poi likes this place the best, too!
LastCorruptedRecord4-8SUBED_38.korean: 그치? 포이도 여기가 제일 마음에 들어!

LastCorruptedRecord4-8SUBED_39.english: The number of cats has increased...

LastCorruptedRecord4-8SUBED_5.english: I'm sorry, Perrault. An urgent interior renovation was scheduled for today.
LastCorruptedRecord4-8SUBED_5.korean: 미안해, 페로 언니.&n오늘 급하게 내부 공사를 일정이 잡혔어.

LastCorruptedRecord4-8SUBED_6.english: It looks like it's going to be noisy for a while.

LastCorruptedRecord4-8SUBED_7.english: ...that's what they say. It's okay. There are still other good places.
LastCorruptedRecord4-8SUBED_7.korean: ...라고 하네요.&n괜찮아요. 아직 좋은 장소는 더 있으니까요.

LastCorruptedRecord4-8SUBED_9.english: The next place is here. It's usually crowded, but it should be quiet at this time.
LastCorruptedRecord4-8SUBED_9.korean: 다음 장소는 여기에요.&n평소엔 붐비지만 지금 시간대라면 조용할 거예요.

LastCorruptedRecord4-9ED_12.english: No, there's Chii and Aruel too.

LastCorruptedRecord4-9ED_14.english: So… um… I don’t remember very well… but anyway, my name is Chii, and my name is Aruel.
LastCorruptedRecord4-9ED_14.korean: 그러니까… 음… 잘은 기억 안 나지만… 아무튼 내 이름은 치이, 그리고 아루엘이야.

LastCorruptedRecord4-9ED_16.english: … I don’t know what to do.

LastCorruptedRecord4-9ED_18.english: Perrault? Why are you staring at me like that? Do you want to play with me? If it's Perrault, I'm happy to play with you anytime!
LastCorruptedRecord4-9ED_18.korean: 페로? 왜 그렇게 쳐다봐? 혹시 나랑 놀고 싶어?&n페로라면 언제든 같이 놀아도 좋아!

LastCorruptedRecord4-9ED_19.english: Why does Chii want to live with humans even though she thinks of herself as a cat?
LastCorruptedRecord4-9ED_19.korean: 치이는 왜 자신을 고양이라고 생각하면서도, 인간과 함께 살고 싶어 하는 거예요?

LastCorruptedRecord4-9ED_2.english: Why are you suddenly saying that...?

LastCorruptedRecord4-9ED_20.english: That’s… because I want to be with humans.

LastCorruptedRecord4-9ED_21.english: What is the reason you want to be together and protect?
LastCorruptedRecord4-9ED_21.korean: 함께하고 싶고, 지키고 싶다는 건 무슨 이유 때문이죠?

LastCorruptedRecord4-9ED_22.english: … I don't really know. I just want to protect humans and live with them.
LastCorruptedRecord4-9ED_22.korean: …잘 모르겠어.&n단지 나는 인간을 지키고 같이 생활하고 싶을 뿐이야.

LastCorruptedRecord4-9ED_23.english: I'll do anything to do that.

LastCorruptedRecord4-9ED_24.english: What about Perrault? And Foy too. They're cats, so why are they with the Commander?
LastCorruptedRecord4-9ED_24.korean: 그러는 페로는 어때?&n포이도 그렇고, 고양이인데 왜 사령관이랑 같이 있는 거야?

LastCorruptedRecord4-9ED_25.english: After all, Poi and I are 'Companions' whose mission is to protect our Master. Poi… might be wanting something else, though.
LastCorruptedRecord4-9ED_25.korean: 저랑 포이는 주인님을 지키는 게 임무인 ‘컴패니언’이니까요.&n포이는… 다른 걸 더 바라고 있을지도 모르지만요.

LastCorruptedRecord4-9ED_26.english: Is Perrault on bad terms with Poi?

LastCorruptedRecord4-9ED_27.english: That's not the case. It's because Poi has become much gentler than before.
LastCorruptedRecord4-9ED_27.korean: 그런 건 아니에요.&n예전보다 포이가 많이 순해졌으니까요.

LastCorruptedRecord4-9ED_28.english: However, I think there is still a long way to go.

LastCorruptedRecord4-9ED_29.english: But you two are friends, right? Why don't you two get along well since you're both cats?
LastCorruptedRecord4-9ED_29.korean: 그래도 두 사람은 친구잖아? 같은 고양이끼리 사이좋게 지내는 건 어때?

LastCorruptedRecord4-9ED_30.english: Friend… I’ve never thought of it that way. Can Poi and I really be friends?
LastCorruptedRecord4-9ED_30.korean: 친구… 그런 식으로 생각해 본 적은 없네요.&n저랑 포이가 정말 친구가 될 수 있을까요?

LastCorruptedRecord4-9ED_31.english: Of course! It's possible! Because those two are my friends!
LastCorruptedRecord4-9ED_31.korean: 당연하지! 될 수 있어!&n왜냐면 두 사람은 내 친구니까!

LastCorruptedRecord4-9ED_32.english: A friend of a friend is naturally a friend!
